findings: BUG-1 TryUnescape: single-char quote -> IndexOf(char,1,-1) throws.
BUG-2 TryUnescape: single-char double-quote -> input[1..^1] range exception.
SplitCommandLine: unclosed quote discards all input.
SplitCommandLine: adjacent quoted strings emit 2 tokens not 1.
ParseOptionAndSeparators: empty option name not rejected.
ValidateOptionsArgumentArity OQ-1: absent required options not caught.
ValidateOptionsArgumentArity OQ-2: KeyNotFoundException if called before ValidateNoUnknownOptions.
ValidateOptionsArgumentArity OQ-4: grammar defect (at least 1 arguments).
